eula.title: License Agreement
eula.subtitle: To proceed with the installation of the Voboost software modifications onto your Voyah multimedia system, you must read and agree to the following terms and conditions:
eula.mustAccept: You must accept the license agreement to continue
eula.scrollToRead: Scroll to read the full agreement

welcome.title: Voboost Install
welcome.description: We are about to install the Voboost application onto your vehicle.
welcome.description2: This software significantly expands your multimedia system's capabilities.
welcome.learnMore: You can read more details about the features at voboost.ru/features
welcome.learnMoreDesc: You can read more details about the features at

download.title: Select Version
download.subtitle: Select a version to install from the list below, which is loaded from the signed OTA manifest on github.com. Or select a manifest.json file, or a local APK.
download.ready: Ready to install. APK downloaded and verified successfully.
download.fetchError: Failed to fetch or verify the OTA manifest. Please check your internet connection.
download.hashMismatch: File verification failed. Please try again.

connection.title: Connect Your Vehicle
connection.subtitle: Follow these steps to connect your car's head unit

install.title: Installing Voboost
install.subtitle: Applying modifications to the vehicle multimedia unit

complete.title: Installation Complete!
complete.subtitle: Voboost has been successfully installed on your vehicle.
complete.instructions: The system will automatically reboot if it hasn't already. Once booted, you will find the Voboost application in your app drawer.
